title: ononis glabrescens var. filifolia
intro: Ononis glabrescens var. filifolia, also known as the Mediterranean restharrow, is a variety of flowering plant in the legume family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ononis glabrescens var. filifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used to treat various ailments, including respiratory infections and skin conditions.
